text.tspan: Problem: every coding tool wanted its own config file.
...repos had to ship FIVE config files for the same context.
Solution: AGENTS.md - one file, adopted by 60k+ projects, supported by all major coding agents.
(closest one wins for files in that subtree)
Cursor, Continue, Aider, Cline, Roo Code
OpenAI Codex CLI, Codex on web
Governed by community spec at agents.md
They COMPOSE - a project has one AGENTS.md
